projectSummary: Q4 sprint planning notes lay out a tightly-scoped week with three parallel workstreams converging before testing: ship the login module by Friday 2026-07-03, with Rahul delivering the backend API and Ananya delivering the dashboard design in parallel. Payment integration is fully gated on receiving Stripe API keys (no owner assigned yet), and a system-wide testing cycle kicks off the following Monday (2026-07-06) once all four streams reach a testable state. The critical path is the Friday login-module ship, supported by Rahul's API; the largest unresolved external dependency is the Stripe API keys.
objectives: Ship the login module by Friday 2026-07-03 so QA can begin on Monday with a stable base.
Stand up the backend API (Rahul) and the dashboard design (Ananya) in parallel in time for Monday testing.
Unblock payment integration by obtaining Stripe API keys so the Monday test cycle can cover billing.
Kick off system testing on Monday 2026-07-06.

tasks.name: Integrate payment (blocked pending Stripe API keys)

risks.name: Payment integration is blocked on Stripe API keys not yet received
risks.description: Payment integration is blocked on Stripe API keys not yet received
risks.solution: Escalate immediately to whoever controls the Stripe account to obtain both test and live keys; in parallel, build and test the payment flow against Stripe's sandbox so the integration is verified the moment real keys arrive and Monday testing is not delayed.

risks.name: Login module has a hard Friday deadline and depends on Rahul's backend API being ready in parallel
risks.description: Login module has a hard Friday deadline and depends on Rahul's backend API being ready in parallel
risks.solution: Track login-module progress daily this week with Rahul and the module owner; if scope starts to slip, pre-agree a minimum-testable cut (core auth / email-password + session) so the Friday ship date is still met.

risks.name: Monday testing kickoff depends on backend API, dashboard, and login module all reaching a testable state in time
risks.description: Monday testing kickoff depends on backend API, dashboard, and login module all reaching a testable state in time
risks.solution: Hold a Monday-morning readiness review with Rahul and Ananya; define a minimum-testable cut of each component, verify the test environment and fixtures are in place, and confirm Stripe test keys are available before QA begins.

recommendations.title: Escalate the Stripe API key request today so payment integration is unblocked before Monday's testing starts; in parallel, build and test against Stripe's sandbox so the integration is verified end-to-end the moment real keys arrive.
recommendations.description: Escalate the Stripe API key request today so payment integration is unblocked before Monday's testing starts; in parallel, build and test against Stripe's sandbox so the integration is verified end-to-end the moment real keys arrive.

recommendations.title: Run a daily login-module check-in this week with Rahul and the module owner to protect the Friday 2026-07-03 deadline.
recommendations.description: Run a daily login-module check-in this week with Rahul and the module owner to protect the Friday 2026-07-03 deadline.

recommendations.title: Pre-define a minimum-testable scope for the login module (core auth / email-password + session) as a fallback if any workstream slips, to keep the Friday ship date.
recommendations.description: Pre-define a minimum-testable scope for the login module (core auth / email-password + session) as a fallback if any workstream slips, to keep the Friday ship date.

recommendations.title: Hold a Monday-morning readiness review with Rahul and Ananya to confirm backend, dashboard, and login are all stable enough to test, and that Stripe test keys are available.
recommendations.description: Hold a Monday-morning readiness review with Rahul and Ananya to confirm backend, dashboard, and login are all stable enough to test, and that Stripe test keys are available.

recommendations.title: Align Rahul's API contract and Ananya's dashboard designs ahead of Monday so QA can exercise both end-to-end from day one.
recommendations.description: Align Rahul's API contract and Ananya's dashboard designs ahead of Monday so QA can exercise both end-to-end from day one.
